name: Setting Up Reply Templates
body: [{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Reply Templates","bold":true},{"text":" are predefined messages that an agent can create and utilize as a form of communication while replying to a ticket. Such automated responses help reduce messaging time and help in interacting with customers more effectively."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Creating reply templates is quite easy and hassle-free. You and other agents can create such responses and use them while replying to a client’s ticket."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Steps to Create a Reply Template"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"1. Log in to your Service Cloud account, then click the user profile menu at the top of the application bar and choose "},{"text":"Settings","bold":true},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/E1S3S5DDKNI5/userprofile7.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/E1S3S5DDKNI5/userprofile7.png","name":"userprofile7.png","type":"image/png","size":206434,"width":2880,"height":981,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","mediaID":860,"dateInserted":"2025-10-01T11:27:04+00:00","insertUserID":2012,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"2012","embedType":"image"}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"2. On the "},{"text":"Settings","bold":true},{"text":" page, select "},{"text":"Reply Templates","bold":true},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/N9B3SD2E5GK0/userprofile8.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/N9B3SD2E5GK0/userprofile8.png","name":"userprofile8.png","type":"image/png","size":137781,"width":2880,"height":1173,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","mediaID":861,"dateInserted":"2025-10-01T11:29:17+00:00","insertUserID":2012,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"2012","embedType":"image"}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"3. To create responses, click the "},{"text":"New Reply Template","bold":true},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/EKI0CUBS2ULB/userprofile9.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/EKI0CUBS2ULB/userprofile9.png","name":"userprofile9.png","type":"image/png","size":74296,"width":2755,"height":611,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","mediaID":862,"dateInserted":"2025-10-01T11:31:41+00:00","insertUserID":2012,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"2012","embedType":"image"}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"4. Under the "},{"text":"New Reply Template ","bold":true},{"text":"slider, enter the details that the replies will contain. Such templates will contain the following fields:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Template Name:","bold":true},{"text":" Enter a title for the new reply template."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Response Message: ","bold":true},{"text":"Enter a pre-saved response that you and your agents can use while replying to a ticket."}]}]}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/EU8XSC1MVBDL/userprofile10.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/EU8XSC1MVBDL/userprofile10.png","name":"userprofile10.png","type":"image/png","size":247975,"width":2755,"height":1509,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","mediaID":863,"dateInserted":"2025-10-01T11:40:34+00:00","insertUserID":2012,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"2012","embedType":"image"}},{"type":"callout","children":[{"type":"callout-item","children":[{"text":"Note","bold":true},{"text":": "},{"text":"Template title ","bold":true},{"text":"and "},{"text":"Response Message","bold":true},{"text":" are "},{"text":"mandatory ","bold":true},{"text":"fields to be entered."}]}],"appearance":"info"},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"5. Optionally, you can use the "},{"text":"Insert Tag ","bold":true},{"text":"drop-down field to include tags in the reply template. This is helpful since it adds more information and context to your tickets."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/temp18.05T5g00000rL1tQEAS.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/temp18.05T5g00000rL1tQEAS.png","name":"User-added image","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":525,"width":700}},{"type":"callout","children":[{"type":"callout-item","children":[{"text":"Note","bold":true},{"text":": Taglines include basic ticket and agent-related contact details that can be inserted into the pre-saved replies."}]}],"appearance":"info"},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"6. Additionally, agents can upload documents, images, or brochures with the help of the "},{"text":"Attachment ","bold":true},{"text":"tool while creating a template."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/Z3BVVJAYI3D6/userprofile11.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/Z3BVVJAYI3D6/userprofile11.png","name":"userprofile11.png","type":"image/png","size":217143,"width":2755,"height":1176,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","mediaID":866,"dateInserted":"2025-10-01T11:48:39+00:00","insertUserID":2012,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"2012","embedType":"image"}},{"type":"callout","children":[{"type":"callout-item","children":[{"text":"Important Note","bold":true},{"text":": Attachments need to be uploaded in "},{"text":"JPG, PNG, PDF, ","bold":true},{"text":"and "},{"text":"DOC ","bold":true},{"text":"formats only."}]}],"appearance":"info"},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"7. Save your template."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/temp20.05T5g00000rL0BtEAK.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/temp20.05T5g00000rL0BtEAK.png","name":"User-added image","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":525,"width":700}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"8. Agents can view their pre-saved responses on the "},{"text":"Reply Templates ","bold":true},{"text":"Index page. The Service Cloud provides agents the option to either edit their saved templates or discard them."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/SR7RV3PP4494/userprofile12.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/SR7RV3PP4494/userprofile12.png","name":"userprofile12.png","type":"image/png","size":111086,"width":2755,"height":792,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","mediaID":865,"dateInserted":"2025-10-01T11:41:42+00:00","insertUserID":2012,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"2012","embedType":"image"}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Using Reply Templates"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"1. These templates are normally used by agents while they are replying to a ticket. Agents can simply click on the "},{"text":"Reply Templates","bold":true},{"text":" icon >> search and select a template from the list that is displayed >> and insert the response template into the "},{"text":"reply to","bold":true},{"text":" textbox."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/UQRIMA1NHOZJ/userprofile13.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/UQRIMA1NHOZJ/userprofile13.png","name":"userprofile13.png","type":"image/png","size":363706,"width":2755,"height":1506,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","mediaID":867,"dateInserted":"2025-10-01T11:53:10+00:00","insertUserID":2012,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"2012","embedType":"image"}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"2. The pre-saved information and attachments will be displayed in your replies."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/WUU5DN9M1UKV/userprofile14.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/WUU5DN9M1UKV/userprofile14.png","name":"userprofile14.png","type":"image/png","size":321302,"width":2755,"height":1509,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","mediaID":868,"dateInserted":"2025-10-01T11:53:40+00:00","insertUserID":2012,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"2012","embedType":"image"}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]}]
